name: Pushkar Vashisht
headline: I build the messy middle between brand, creators and growth.
subheadline: Creative operator for internet-native brands, creator campaigns and content systems where taste, speed and proof have to work in the same room.
pitch: Pushkar builds brand worlds, creator rooms and content machines that make messy attention measurable enough to hire.
fit: Brand manager and creator growth roles
